title: White dog in the premium setting
goal: Establish the pristine white dog, the warm elegant interior, and the quiet luxury tone before any transformation begins.

title: Dog and bowl fully framed
goal: Hold the same white dog beside the premium bowl and packaging in a composed, ready-to-eat hero composition.

title: White dog begins eating
goal: Show the white dog lowering its head to the bowl and starting to eat with calm, natural motion.

title: Transformation completed to black
goal: Reveal the same dog after the smooth coat transition, now fully black and still calmly eating or just lifting its head.

title: Black dog settles into the hero pose
goal: Present the transformed black dog in the same elegant setting with a composed, premium posture.

title: Final black dog hero frame
goal: End on a polished hero image of the black dog beside the product, with a calm aspirational finish.
